options.name: help
options.description: Get help.

options.name: info
options.description: Show general information about the bot.

options.name: connect
options.description: Connect to Strava.

options.name: disconnect
options.description: Disconnect from Strava.

options.name: user
options.description: User to disconnect (guild owners only).

options.name: set
options.description: Change settings.

options.name: units
options.description: Change display units.

options.name: fields
options.description: Display all, none or any combination of specific activity fields.

options.name: maps
options.description: Change the way maps are displayed.

options.name: sync
options.description: Sync activities (default is true).

options.name: private
options.description: Sync private (only you) activities (default is false).

options.name: followers
options.description: Sync followers only activities (default is true).

options.name: retention
options.description: Set the amount of time to retain activities (default is 30 days).

options.name: timezone
options.description: Set the team timezone used for activity day boundaries, or use auto to detect it.

options.name: userlimit
options.description: Set the max activities posted per user per day (default is unlimited).

options.name: channellimit
options.description: Set the max activities posted per channel per day (default is unlimited).

options.name: leaderboard
options.description: Leaderboard metric and range (default is distance).

options.name: activities
options.description: Activity types to post in this channel, comma-separated, or 'all' to reset (admin only).

options.name: leaderboard
options.description: Display a team leaderboard.

options.name: metric
options.description: Leaderboard measure.

options.name: range
options.description: Date range (since, between, etc.).

options.name: stats
options.description: Display stats for the past 30 days.

options.name: subscription
options.description: Show subscription info and a link to update the payment method.

options.name: unsubscribe
options.description: Turn off subscription auto-renew.

options.name: resubscribe
options.description: Turn on subscription auto-renew.
